title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, King, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, X Drake, Unknown person #16 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it even possible to have such bad luck?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We looked away for just one second time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unlike you, I haven't eaten any- thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was a safe full of food that had been recently tampered with

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Who rummaged through this ship here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we're the only ones on this island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had all of my hopes and dreams

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hinging on a man I just met.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I should have known" I was going to be let down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: though... was it right to hit him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How else would he have been that able

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 28 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
